q: How do I import a transaction file?
a: Go to the Import page, select your file (CSV, Excel or PDF) and click Start Import. Spendify will automatically detect the format and categorize your transactions.
Spendify supports CSV, Excel (.xlsx) and PDF bank statement files. The system automatically detects the file structure.

q: How do I change a transaction's category?
a: You can edit the category from the Registry page by clicking on the transaction, or from the Review page for low-confidence transactions.
